ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Karolyn Poppin appeared via zoom for David Feinstein (proposed administrator).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated April 13, 1976 is admitted to probate. David M. Feinstein is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 03, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
